content.raw:
may 9, 2026  | London 

The Conference That's Sold Out 6 Times Running

  • 80% of 2026 tickets sold in 72 hours
https://sellersessions.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/New-video-venue-V2-.mp4 Reserve Your Workstation

Terms and Conditions

Built for Innovators. Not Imitators.

  • 7-8 figure sellers teaching cutting-edge strategies
  • 47.5% return rate - sellers keep coming back
  • The original format everyone else copies
We bring together the best minds in Amazon - lineup announcement coming soon

This Room Is For Sellers Who...

  • Build systems, not campaigns
  • Want cutting-edge tools that work
  • Learn by doing, not listening
  • Think long-term, not quick fixes
  • Lead markets, don't follow

This Isn't
For You If...

  • You copy listings and join the sea of same
  • You're stuck in 2018 keyword stuffing
  • You're looking for freebies and shortcuts
  • You watch others before you move
  • You step over pounds to save pennies

Thomas Edison

Reserve My Seat Now
  • Modullar Format

We've rebuilt the conference model from the ground up. In 2025, we took a massive risk and implemented a hands-on adapted VARK model to maximise comprehension, which paid off.

In May 2025, we sold 80% of the tickets for 2026 (this event) within just 72 hours—a full 12 months in advance.

As the day progresses, the entire venue transforms—lighting changes, layout evolves, atmosphere shifts. Everything under one roof.
This is a MODULAR FORMAT - One Roof. Multiple Phases. Seamless Flow.

 MORNING: Focused tool building and AI implementation

MIDDAY: Campaign architecture and system development

AFTERNOON: Live execution and real-time collaboration

EVENING: High-trust networking and deep conversations

  • INNOVATION & ATMOSPHERE

Forget the highbrow, stiff, hotel conference energy.

BREAKTHROUGH ENVIRONMENT:

A psychological canvas designed to ignite your creative thinking - not just aesthetically stunning

EVOLVING ATMOSPHERE:

Spaces that transform throughout the day, deliberately crafted to sharpen your strategic edge

BRUTAL MARKETPLACE REALITY:

Amazon grows more demanding by the day with shrinking margins and rapidly expiring tactics

AI REVOLUTION:

The future belongs to those who harness artificial intelligence with original thought, not those who mindlessly follow

Advanced hands-on learning in a workshop format

  • Dedicated workstation (Power outlets provided). Library of custom bots and plugins.
  • Walkthroughs and resources (Will be provided)
  • Bring your own laptop - This is essential

Why This Format Works—for Innovators:

Every Attendee Builds and Walks Away with Elite-level strategies that can be instantly deployed by their team on Monday morning—turning inspiration into immediate action. Education Focused on What's Working Now, Not Outdated Tactics. We avoid magical strategies and secret hacks in favour of substantial methodologies that deliver genuine, long-term results. A Room Where You're Surrounded by Doers, Not Spectators. While others attend superficial networking events, you'll engage in practical work alongside serious sellers committed to measurable growth.

Practical Workshop Format

Clear, hands-on sessions with structured activities—all designed to give you implementable takeaways that transform theory into immediate practice.

Beyond Surface-Level Content

While others arrive with basic slide decks hunting for leads, we deliver substantial, actionable content crafted specifically for genuine seller growth.

Elite Educational Experience

Our unmatched expertise in delivering comprehension at the highest level sets us apart from the many who attempt to replicate our distinctive conference format.

Direct Access to Tools

Experience the only Amazon conference worldwide that develops fully functional, professional-grade deployed tools integrated directly into the conference curriculum.

Meticulously Crafted Agenda

Unlike typical conferences, we invest six months with a specialised team to thoughtfully orchestrate every moment of your experience for maximum impact and value.

Meaningful Networking

Connect with brilliant seven- and eight-figure sellers in an environment carefully curated to shield you from the service provider solicitations that plague 99% of conferences.

Evening Strategy Sessions: Continue your development with organised evening discussions and roundtables focused on actionable insights from fellow sellers that extend learning beyond standard conference hours.

Secure Your Data-Driven Advantage — Book Your Seat Now
